scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm -w streaming-markdown-starter run build
scripts.build:packages: npm -w @stream-mdx/core run build && npm -w @stream-mdx/plugins run build && npm -w @stream-mdx/worker run build && npm -w @stream-mdx/react run build && npm -w @stream-mdx/mermaid run build && npm -w @stream-mdx/protocol run build && npm -w @stream-mdx/tui run build && npm -w @stream-mdx/theme-tailwind run build && npm -w stream-mdx run build
scripts.docs:worker:build: npm run docs:prepare && npm run docs:worker:build:raw
scripts.docs:snapshots:build: npm run docs:prepare && npm run docs:snapshots:build:raw
scripts.docs:dev: npm run docs:prepare && npm run docs:worker:build:raw && npm run docs:snapshots:build:raw && npm -w stream-mdx-docs run dev
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:prepare && npm run docs:worker:build:raw && npm run docs:snapshots:build:raw && npm -w stream-mdx-docs run build
scripts.docs:screenshots:smoke: CAPTURE_ONLY="/,/docs/getting-started,/docs/tui-json-protocol,/docs/guides/mermaid-diagrams" CAPTURE_OUT_DIR="tmp/screenshots/docs-site-smoke" CAPTURE_FAIL_ON_ERRORS=1 CAPTURE_FAIL_ON_CONSOLE=1 CAPTURE_FAIL_ON_OVERLAY=1 npm exec -- tsx scripts/capture-docs-screenshots.ts
scripts.test:regression: npm run test:regression:html && npm run test:regression:styles
scripts.test:reliability:packages: npm -w @stream-mdx/core run test && npm -w @stream-mdx/worker run test && npm -w @stream-mdx/react run test
scripts.test:reliability:docs: npm run test:regression:styles && npm run test:runtime:worker-races
